_comment: Pinned SHA-256 checksums of release tarballs and bundled binaries. Update on every BlockDAG release. The installer uses these to verify downloads.

known_workarounds_active: docker-compose.override.yml with network: host on build steps (Bug 14, apt-mirror flakiness)
Auto-retry build with --no-cache on first failure (Bug 14)
Force-set BUILD_CONTEXT=. and DOCKERFILE=dockerfile in .env so compose doesn't fall back to git-dev defaults (Bug 7)
Auto-detect snapshot file presence and flip SNAPSHOT_PATH accordingly (Bug 8)
Set %ProgramData% on Windows to avoid Docker Desktop crashloop on launch from spawned shells (Bug 6)
v1.3.23._jarvis_note: Repacked from blockdag-pool-release-20260510-152225-stack.zip and rehosted on miners.dagtech.network/downloads — bdagstack.bdagdev.xyz origin went dark 2026-06-12. Inner dir renamed to pool-stack-docker-pool-v1.3.23 to match INNER_PREFIX.

cpu-v1.3.3._status: DEPRECATED — superseded by v1.3.23. Has Bug 1 (dockerfile flag-position) and Bug 2 (snapshot format mismatch). Do not use.
